home.welcome_msg: Thank you for visiting my portfolio!
home.name: Mitsuhiro Harashima
home.bio:
Currently a senior at Sun Moon University, majoring in AI Software within the Faculty of Software Convergence.
In 2023, I completed a six-month internship at Number One Solutions Co., Ltd.
I am scheduled to graduate in February 2026 and will join Isoroot Corporation as a Software Engineer in April 2026.

cv.title: Education & Experience
cv.description: A brief overview of my academic background and professional experience.
cv.bachelor_detail: Focused on AI and software development. Gained experience in development using Python and JavaScript, AI model building, and data analysis.
cv.hs_detail: Developed an interest in information processing and programming, learning basic algorithms and ICT skills.
cv.exp_name: Visitor Records Management at a Korean Company
cv.exp_detail: Managed visitor lists using Google Sheets. Later developed a custom application to improve the efficiency of manual tasks.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: I look forward to hearing from you.
